# repo-triage

Assess one repository before mutating it by reading current status, progress, logs, and health signals.

## Steps

1. Start from the repo-native references before using mutating tools.
2. Read the relevant resources first: ralph:///{repo}/triage, ralph:///{repo}/status, ralph:///{repo}/progress, ralph:///{repo}/logs, ralph:///runtime/health.
3. Route the task through the matching skills: ralphglasses-repo-admin (.agents/skills/ralphglasses-repo-admin/SKILL.md), ralphglasses-recovery-observability (.agents/skills/ralphglasses-recovery-observability/SKILL.md).
4. Load only the required tool groups: core, repo, observability.
5. Use the key tools as the primary execution path: ralphglasses_status, ralphglasses_repo_health, ralphglasses_logs.
6. When structured prompting helps, use the matching prompts: repo-triage-brief, code-review, test-generation.
